label: Second Wind via v2 combat/summary UI
strengths: Checks half-HP gate unless feat rules override
Checks encounter cap
Calculates max(floor(maxHP/4), Constitution score)
Consumes use and stores encounter flag
Routes feat/talent resource hooks through MetaResourceFeatResolver
seams: Legacy SWSEActor._onSecondWind() can bypass canonical SecondWindRules if still reachable
Some UI appears to display uses as /1 rather than computed max
Droid/nonheroic eligibility should be explicitly audited against Extra Second Wind

label: Legacy actor sheet Second Wind
strengths: Simple HP cap and use decrement
seams: Uses stored system.secondWind.healing instead of recalculating RAW formula
Does not enforce half-HP gate in the inspected snippet
Does not enforce encounter cap
Bypasses ActorEngine.applySecondWind() hooks

label: DamageSystem healing/repair dialog
strengths: Uses common Actor.applyHealing wrapper
Displays repair language for droids
seams: isRepair option is not preserved through ActorBase.applyHealing() into ActorEngine.applyHealing()
No organic-vs-droid target gating at ActorEngine.applyHealing() except destroyed droid
No rule formula, action economy, gear requirement, cooldown, or check result

label: GM Combat & Recovery Heal/Repair
rulesAuthority: GM console workflow selection and user-entered amount
strengths: Correctly separates organic Heal from Droid/Vehicle Repair at the GM UI/service layer
Refuses Heal on droids/vehicles and Repair on organics
Can repair disabled droids back to operational through ActorEngine.applyHealing()
seams: Fixed/manual amounts are not RAW First Aid or Mechanics Repair formulas
Gear requirements are not checked
Repair duration and self-repair penalty are not represented

label: HealingMechanics Treat Injury integration
strengths: First Aid formula is mostly RAW-shaped
Long-Term Care cooldown exists
Surgery and Critical Care have methods
Uses meet-or-beat comparisons for DCs
seams: Healing skill integration is houserule-gated and may not be live by default
Targets only game.actors of type character in the dialog
Gear requirements/consumption are not enforced
Failure damage uses direct HP update rather than canonical damage packet
GM console Treat Injury workflows do not use the same formulas

label: GM Combat & Recovery Treat Injury workflows
strengths: Skips droids and vehicles for Treat Injury
Uses total >= DC success logic
Includes First Aid, Surgery, Critical Care, Long-Term Care, Revivify stubs
seams: First Aid amount defaults to fixed 5 rather than level + margin
Surgery amount defaults to fixed 10 rather than Con bonus x level
Critical Care default DC/amount do not match supplied rule
Long-Term Care marks a flag but does not compute rest bonus
Revivify heals 1 HP rather than explicitly setting unconscious-not-dead state

label: Natural Healing / rest recovery
mutationAuthority: RecoveryMechanics direct updateData via ActorEngine.updateActor(), or ActorEngine.applyHealing() in fullOrganicRecovery
strengths: Droids and vehicles are excluded from rest recovery
Second Wind reset timing is houserule-aware
seams: RAW Natural Healing level-based formula is not the obvious default
Persistent conditions do not clearly block natural healing
Once-per-24-hour natural healing is not clearly tracked
Full organic recovery is a GM override, not RAW natural healing

label: Droid/Object/Vehicle Repair
strengths: Repair path is separated from organic Treat Injury in GM console
Droid/vehicle type gating exists
Disabled droid operational state is restored when HP becomes positive
seams: Droid repair should restore droid character level HP at DC 20 after 1 hour
Object/vehicle repair should restore 1d8 HP at DC 20 after 1 hour
Tool Kit requirement is not enforced
Self-repair -5 and vehicle condition penalties while onboard are not modeled
Objects are not clearly represented as repair targets

label: Force healing and drain-heal powers
mutationAuthority: Mixed: no-op for generic healing effects, direct HP mutations in Dark Healing plans
strengths: Vital Transfer and drain-heal data exists
Dark Healing plans compute damage and source healing
seams: ForcePowerEffectsEngine healing builder returns no effect and no HP mutation
Dark Healing plans directly mutate HP rather than using canonical damage/heal packets
Target type and condition-removal rules for Force healing need explicit context

label: Bonus Hit Points / temporary buffer
mutationAuthority: ActorEngine.applyDamage(), talent mechanics direct temp/buffer updates
strengths: Damage resolution can persist bonusHpAfter to system.hp.bonus
Bolster Ally exists as a mechanics path
seams: Need canonical stacking rule: multiple Bonus HP sources use the larger pool only
Need end-of-encounter cleanup
Need clear difference between SWSE Bonus HP and generic temp HP
